tracks.rawText: 2:53Amanati - Mohë Mohë - Official Video [eb_E1UeywWQ]v5.5CoverBengali folk-fusion track blending traditional Baul elements with modern hip-hop production, The arrangement features a prominent ektara plucking a rhythmic drone, accompanied by a dotara playing melodic flourishes, A heavy hip-hop drum kit drives the rhythm with a punchy kick and a crisp snare on the backbeat, The bassline consists of deep, sustained sub-bass notes that follow the root of the folk melody, Male vocals are delivered in a traditional Baul style, characterized by melismatic ornaments and a wide vibrato, transitioning into a rhythmic, spoken-word delivery in the mid-section, The tempo is 95 BPM in 4/4 time, High-frequency shakers and a subtle tambourine provide rhythmic subdivision in the percussion layer, A low-pass filter sweep occurs during the transition between the folk-heavy intro and the beat-driven verse2PublishRemix
tracks.title: Amanati - Mohë Mohë - Official Video [eb_E1UeywWQ]

tracks.rawText: 4:35Easy Star All Stars_Dub Side of the Moon - Time [1005852]v5.5CoverReggae-rock fusion with elements of progressive rock, The arrangement features a clean electric guitar playing syncopated reggae skanks on the offbeats, a melodic bass guitar with a rounded tone, and a drum kit utilizing a tight snare and prominent hi-hat work, A secondary electric guitar provides distorted lead lines and power chords during transitions, Male vocals are delivered with a rhythmic, almost spoken-word quality in the verses, shifting to a melodic tenor in the choruses, The tempo is 128 BPM in 4/4 time, The track features frequent use of dub-style delay on vocal ad-libs and snare hits, The structure includes sudden shifts between sparse reggae verses and dense, rock-oriented sections with heavy crash cymbals and sustained guitar chords2PublishRemix
tracks.title: Easy Star All Stars_Dub Side of the Moon - Time [1005852]

tracks.rawText: 4:00mi familiav5.5Corridos tumbados, Guitarras sierreñas suaves y melancólicas Voz relajada, casi susurrada Letras introspectivas: calle, amor, ansiedad, nostalgia, éxito, vacío emocional Beats modernos mezclados con regional mexicano Mucho ambiente nocturno/cinemático Reverbs amplios y bajos profundos Mood “triste pero poderoso”PublishRemix
tracks.title: mi familia
